title: Context Pack — Compact LLM-bound form
description: Minified, token-optimised projection of context-pack.schema.json. Lives in state/context-packs-compact/<fqcn>.json. Planner-only fields are stripped. forbidden[] is omitted because enforcement lives in system prompt + gate_runner + patcher + linter.

stk.description: Positional stack tuple: [javaVersion, testFramework, mockFramework, assertFramework, springEnabled, namespaceStyle, testVersion?, mockVersion?, springBootVersion?]

cov.description: Coverage rows: [[targetId, method, missedLines, missedBranches, branchId|null], ...]

imp.description: Allowed imports. Either a prefix-compressed object or a flat array (when <3 prefix hits).

cls.description: [bucket, subtype?] — bucket is a reduced classification bucket derived locally.

eid.description: Evidence id pool referenced by ctor[*][0] and meth[*][0].

tr.description: Truncated field names (e.g. ["imp"]) when budget enforcement clipped the pack.

fm.description: P3.d: failure-memory projection. Each row is the positional tuple [hash, errorCode, symbolFQN, fixId, attempts, lastResult, lastSeenCycle?].
